zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Vivian de Davenport於1190年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，他的父親Richard de Davenport55歲，母親Amabilia de Venables44歲。他於1225年與Baroness Beatrix de Hulme在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1260年在英國爾達文波特享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Vivian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Vivian de Davenport was born in 1190, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Davenport, was 55 and his mother, Amabilia de Venables, was 44. He married Baroness Beatrix de Hulme in 1225, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1260, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Vivian de Davenport est né en 1190, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Davenport, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Amabilia de Venables, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Beatrix de Hulme en 1225, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1260, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Vivian de Davenport 1190 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Davenport 55 und seine Mutter Amabilia de Venables 44. Er hat 1225 in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Baroness Beatrix de Hulme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Davenport, Cheshire, England und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Baroness Beatrix de Hulme nel 1225, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1260, nel Davenport, Cheshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: 영국 체실르 플레스트버이 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Baron Vivian de Davenport(이)가 1190년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Davenport(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabilia de Venables(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 Baroness Beatrix de Hulme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1260년 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Vivian de Davenport nasceu em 1190, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Davenport, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Amabilia de Venables, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Beatrix de Hulme em 1225, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: макклесфиелд ст мачаел, престбури, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Vivian de Davenport родился в 1190 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Davenport было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Amabilia de Venables, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Beatrix de Hulme в 1225 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1260 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Baroness Beatrix de Hulme en 1225, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
